entries.title: Your daily gaming companion is here
entries.body: A new Home tab is now your default landing screen. It shows this week's stats at a glance, your four most recently played games with one-tap session logging, tonight's best pick based on your play patterns, active streak alerts, upcoming milestone progress rings, your daily fortune, and any gaming anniversaries from today in history. Open the app daily and it gives you something actionable every time.

entries.title: Compare any two games head to head
entries.body: Open any game's detail sheet, tap the new ⇄ Compare button, and pick a second game from your library. You'll see a full side-by-side breakdown — price, hours, rating, cost-per-hour, ROI, sessions — with a winner highlighted for each category, a radar chart visualising both profiles at once, and an overall verdict showing which game came out on top.

entries.title: What would your library look like with better choices?
entries.body: The new Alternate Reality Simulator in the Stats tab lets you explore four "what if" scenarios: what if you'd skipped impulse buys, never bought games you later abandoned, cleared your backlog, or always bought on sale? Each scenario shows the exact games affected, a before/after stat comparison, and a frank insight about your spending habits.

entries.title: Search your library instantly
entries.body: A search bar now lives at the top of the Games tab. Type a game name, genre, or platform and your list narrows in real time. Works great when you have a big library and just want to find that one game quickly.

entries.title: Updates live here now
entries.body: This is the new What's New panel. When the app changes, you'll see a friendly summary here so you always know what's different.
